'''ây-v-v-h''' ('''kayavvehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phoneticise|phoneticise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-v-v-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phoneticise|phoneticise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-v-v-h
|-
! Lemma
| kayavvehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyavehoko|thiyavehoko]] || [[word:jiyavehoko|jiyavehoko]] || [[word:shiyavehoko|shiyavehoko]] || [[word:kiyavehoko|kiyavehoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyavehoko|thuthuyavehoko]] || [[word:jujuyavehoko|jujuyavehoko]] || [[word:shushuyavehoko|shushuyavehoko]] || [[word:kukuyavehoko|kukuyavehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyavehoko|thoyavehoko]] || [[word:joyavehoko|joyavehoko]] || [[word:shoyavehoko|shoyavehoko]] || [[word:koyavehoko|koyavehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠyavehoko|thĂŠyavehoko]] || [[word:jĂŠyavehoko|jĂŠyavehoko]] || [[word:shĂŠyavehoko|shĂŠyavehoko]] || [[word:kĂŠyavehoko|kĂŠyavehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayavehoko|thathayavehoko]] || [[word:jajayavehoko|jajayavehoko]] || [[word:shashayavehoko|shashayavehoko]] || [[word:kakayavehoko|kakayavehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayavehoko|thayavehoko]] || [[word:jayavehoko|jayavehoko]] || [[word:shayavehoko|shayavehoko]] || [[word:kayavehoko|kayavehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayavehoko|thayavehoko]] || [[word:jayavehoko|jayavehoko]] || [[word:shayavehoko|shayavehoko]] || [[word:kayavehoko|kayavehoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
